description: Student and Homelab Enthusiast, studying Business Computing at Anatolia University

hero.title: CS and Business Student
hero.p1: at Anatolia University, passionate about web development, systems administration, and design.
hero.p2: I have experience in systems management and I have a strong interest for front-end development, as well as a strong background in graphic design and digital creativity.
hero.p3: I'm currently seeking full-time and part time opportunities in the Thessaloniki area, where I can apply my skills and grow as a developer.

item_1.name: oseth-api
item_1.description: Locally hosted Flask scraper/API for OSETH telematics timetable service, exposing real-time bus arrival data as JSON endpoints for Home Assistant and other consumers.

item_2.name: Proxmox Homelab
item_2.description: A self-hosted homelab environment running Proxmox VE, with multiple VMs and containers for testing and development. Includes varied services such as web servers, game servers and locally ran LLMs.

item_1.description: Studied 20+ design briefs, conceptualized visuals for 10+ projects, and delivered brand identity solutions and winning designs in fast-paced hackathon and volunteer settings.

item_2.description: Managed POS operations, handled cash and card transactions, and developed strong time management and customer service skills in a high-pressure environment.

item_3.description: Leader and co-leader of multiple clubs, and Sophomore SGA Representative, organizing events and representing student interests.

react.title: Linux, Bash and related tools

typescript.title: Adobe Creative Cloud
typescript.description: Graphic design and photography workflows using Photoshop, Illustrator, and related tools.

tailwind.title: .NET (C#)
tailwind.description: Introduction to .NET and C# through coursework and personal learning.

nodejs.title: Systems Administration
nodejs.description: Amateur systems administration and homelab virtualization with Proxmox and related tools.

kali_linux.title: Communication & Collaboration
